name: smart-office-monorepo
description: Smart Office Monitoring System — IUT Datathon / Techhathon Nationals

scripts.setup: npm run setup:shared && npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend && npm run setup:bot
scripts.setup:shared: cd shared && npm install && npm run build
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND,BOT" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:bot"
scripts.build: npm run setup:shared && concurrently "cd backend && npm run build" "cd frontend && npm run build" "cd bot && npm run build"
